review_summary: expensiveTransform runs every render, not just initial. useState ignores subsequent values.

issues_found.title: Initializer runs every render
issues_found.explanation: useState evaluates the argument every render even though only the first call is used. expensiveTransform runs on every render.

broader_pattern: Lazy initialization for expensive useState defaults. () => value runs once.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing useState's lazy initializer; spotting wasted computation.

review_summary: Aborted fetches still call setData (in .then). Plus AbortError is unhandled rejection.

issues_found.title: setState after abort
issues_found.explanation: abort() makes fetch reject with AbortError. .then doesn't run, .catch should. But .then(r => r.json()) - if abort before response, r.json() throws. Unhandled.
issues_found.fix: try/catch in async function, check signal.aborted

issues_found.title: AbortError clutters console
issues_found.explanation: Aborts log errors. Should silently ignore.

broader_pattern: AbortError is expected when canceling - swallow it.
what_makes_this_review_senior: AbortError swallowing; ac.signal.aborted check before setState.

review_summary: Rapid tab switch races. data from old tab shown.

issues_found.title: Race condition
issues_found.explanation: Click a → fetch a. Click b → fetch b. b returns first (fast). a returns, overwrites.

issues_found.title: No types
issues_found.explanation: data is any. No type safety.

issues_found.title: Shows stale tab data
issues_found.explanation: Switching to b briefly shows a's data.

broader_pattern: Use React Query: key per tab.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Tab switch race; React Query keyed by tab solves cleanly.

review_summary: filter() can't narrow without type predicate. filtered still typed (User | null)[].

issues_found.title: boolean doesn't narrow
issues_found.explanation: filter() narrows only if predicate returns 'value is T'. boolean = no narrow.

broader_pattern: Type predicates (value is T) narrow types. Plain boolean doesn't.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Type predicate vs boolean; .filter narrowing requires 'is' return.

review_summary: Div not input. No keyboard, no role, no aria-checked, no label association.

issues_found.title: Not focusable
issues_found.explanation: Div isn't keyboard accessible. Tab doesn't reach. Space/Enter doesn't toggle.

issues_found.title: SR doesn't know it's checkbox
issues_found.explanation: role='checkbox' or use <input>

issues_found.title: Space doesn't toggle
issues_found.explanation: Standard checkbox toggles on Space.

issues_found.title: Click label doesn't toggle
issues_found.explanation: Standard: click label = toggle.

broader_pattern: Custom form controls need keyboard, ARIA, label associations. Or use <input> with visual styling.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Native input + sr-only + peer styling: gets all a11y for free.

review_summary: Timer doesn't cancel on unmount = setState on unmounted. Multiple clicks queue multiple timers.

issues_found.title: Timer not canceled
issues_found.explanation: Unmount during 3s = setState on unmounted component.

issues_found.title: Stacked timers
issues_found.explanation: Click twice = two timers, two hides.

broader_pattern: Async setState needs lifecycle management.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Timer lifecycle in components; clear-previous-on-trigger pattern.

review_summary: Saves on every keystroke. No debounce. Network spam.

issues_found.title: PUT per keystroke
issues_found.explanation: Typing 'alice@example.com' = 17 PUT requests.

issues_found.title: Silent failure
issues_found.explanation: PUT fails, state out of sync with server.

broader_pattern: Auto-save needs debounce + error handling.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Auto-save without debounce floods network; mutation rollback pattern.

review_summary: Animating 'right' triggers layout. Use transform.

issues_found.title: Layout-triggering animation
issues_found.explanation: right property changes layout. Reflow each frame.

issues_found.title: Hardcoded width
issues_found.explanation: Tied to w-80.

broader_pattern: Transform > layout properties for animation.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Layout vs compositor properties.

review_summary: Full core-js + regenerator = ~150KB. Targets modern browsers don't need them.

issues_found.title: All polyfills
issues_found.explanation: Imports all of core-js. Modern browsers don't need.

issues_found.title: Pre-ES2017
issues_found.explanation: Async/await is ES2017. Modern browsers support natively.

issues_that_arent_issues: No material non-issues; the review should focus on behavioral risks, missing tests, accessibility, security, and failure handling.
broader_pattern: Browserslist + bundler handles polyfills automatically. Don't import manually.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Browserslist-driven polyfills; modern browsers don't need core-js.

review_summary: fetchUser called on every render creates new Promise. Suspense never resolves.

issues_found.title: New promise every render
issues_found.explanation: Each render creates new Promise. use hook sees different Promise each time. Suspense never resolves.
issues_found.fix: Promise must come from cache (React Query, RSC, or stable ref)

broader_pattern: use() needs cached Promise. Use React Query or RSC.
what_makes_this_review_senior: use() hook needs stable Promise; useSuspenseQuery as canonical.

review_summary: handler in deps recreates on parent render. Sub/unsub churn = events missed during.

issues_found.title: Re-subscribes on parent re-render
issues_found.explanation: handler is inline lambda. New ref each render. Effect re-runs: off, on, off, on... missing events during.

broader_pattern: Subscriptions: use ref for handler to avoid re-subscribe.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Callback-in-deps causes subscription churn; ref pattern.

review_summary: 20+ props mostly visual. Should be variants + state + composition.

issues_found.title: Too many visual props
issues_found.explanation: shape, shadow, border, uppercase, bold are styling axes that should be variants or className overrides.
issues_found.fix: Variants for combinations; className escape hatch

issues_found.title: Should be children
issues_found.explanation: <Button>text</Button> + icon via children composition is more flexible.

broader_pattern: Prop sprawl is design smell. Variants + className + children.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Recognizing prop sprawl; cva + variants + children pattern.

review_summary: No sandbox = iframe can do anything. Including breaking out, accessing parent context.

issues_found.title: No sandbox
issues_found.explanation: Iframe has full privileges. Could navigate parent, run scripts, access cookies (if same-origin).

issues_found.title: URL leaked to iframe
issues_found.explanation: Referer header leaks current page URL.

issues_found.title: CSP for iframe
issues_found.explanation: Should restrict iframe-src

broader_pattern: Iframes need sandbox + referrerPolicy + CSP.
what_makes_this_review_senior: iframe security model; sandbox attribute; referrer policy.

review_summary: Counter persists across renders, increases each render. Plus SSR/CSR different counters.

issues_found.title: ID changes each render
issues_found.explanation: Counter increments per render. ID 'tooltip-1' becomes 'tooltip-2' next render. aria-describedby disconnects.

issues_found.title: Server counter != client counter
issues_found.explanation: Server starts at 0, client may start at different counter if other components rendered first.

broader_pattern: useId() is the React-built-in for SSR-safe unique IDs.
what_makes_this_review_senior: useId for SSR-safe IDs; avoid module-scope counters.

review_summary: NODE_ENV may not be replaced in Vite. Always-on analytics in dev = pollution.

issues_found.title: Vite uses import.meta.env
issues_found.explanation: process.env may be undefined in Vite production. Always falsy.

issues_found.title: Pollutes analytics
issues_found.explanation: Dev sessions clutter prod analytics dashboard.

broader_pattern: Build-time replacement (import.meta.env.DEV) enables dead code elimination.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Vite env semantics; static replacement enables dead code elimination.

review_summary: start changes don't reset Counter. useState ignores prop changes after mount.

issues_found.title: Initial value ignored after mount
issues_found.explanation: useState uses 'start' only on first render. Parent changes 'start' to 100, Counter still shows 0 (or whatever incremented to).
issues_found.fix: key prop to remount, or sync via useEffect

broader_pattern: useState initial value is only first render. Use key or effect to sync.
what_makes_this_review_senior: useState initial value confusion; key prop for reset; explicit sync pattern.

review_summary: No cleanup = observer leaks.

issues_found.title: Observer not disconnected
issues_found.explanation: Component unmount = observer keeps observing detached node. Leak.

issues_found.title: Layout effect for non-layout
issues_found.explanation: useLayoutEffect blocks paint. ResizeObserver doesn't need it. useEffect sufficient.

broader_pattern: Always cleanup observers. useLayoutEffect blocks paint - use sparingly.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Observer cleanup; useLayoutEffect vs useEffect.

review_summary: setSubmitting(false) after navigate runs on unmounted component. Plus no error handling.

issues_found.title: setState on unmounted
issues_found.explanation: navigate unmounts component (route change). setSubmitting fires on unmounted.

issues_found.title: r.ok false silently
issues_found.explanation: User stays on form with no error displayed.

issues_found.title: data type unclear
issues_found.explanation: FormData type from onSubmit? Usually FormEvent.

broader_pattern: Navigate after success; setState before navigate; error handling for both.
what_makes_this_review_senior: setState-after-unmount via navigate; ordering matters.

review_summary: Record<string, any> for updates lets caller send arbitrary fields. No type safety on updates.

issues_found.title: any escapes
issues_found.explanation: Caller can send {invalid: true}, {email: 123}, etc. No compile check.

issues_found.title: r.json() as User without validation
issues_found.explanation: Server response could be anything.

broader_pattern: any in update functions defeats type safety.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Partial<T> for updates; Zod at boundaries.

review_summary: No ARIA roles, no arrow key nav, no aria-selected. SR doesn't recognize tabs.

issues_found.title: No tab/tablist roles
issues_found.explanation: role='tablist', role='tab', role='tabpanel' missing. SR doesn't announce as tabs.

issues_found.title: Arrow keys don't switch
issues_found.explanation: Standard tabs: arrow keys move between tabs. Tab key skips to content.

issues_found.title: Active not announced
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't know which tab is active.

broader_pattern: Use Radix Tabs or react-aria - tab pattern is complex.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Tab pattern is WAI-ARIA spec'd; Radix as canonical.

review_summary: Not reactive. setTheme doesn't trigger re-render. theme value stale across components.

issues_found.title: Not reactive
issues_found.explanation: localStorage write doesn't cause React re-render. UI doesn't update.

issues_found.title: Other tabs don't sync
issues_found.explanation: Tab 1 sets theme, tab 2 doesn't update.

issues_found.title: localStorage on server crashes
issues_found.explanation: localStorage undefined.

broader_pattern: useLocalStorage hook needs reactive state + storage event + SSR safety.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Reactive + cross-tab + SSR-safe; storage event.

review_summary: Button inside form triggers submit. No aria-pressed. No label.

issues_found.title: Default type=submit
issues_found.explanation: Button inside form submits form on click.

issues_found.title: Toggle state not announced
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't know it's pressed/unpressed.

issues_found.title: input no label
issues_found.explanation: a11y

broader_pattern: Buttons inside forms need type='button' unless submitting.
what_makes_this_review_senior: type='button' inside forms; aria-pressed for toggles; autoComplete hint.

review_summary: Animation re-fires every render. On data updates, all items re-animate.

issues_found.title: Re-animates on render
issues_found.explanation: Each render re-applies animation style. Item that's been visible 10s animates again on parent re-render.

issues_found.title: Long stagger for big lists
issues_found.explanation: 100 items × 50ms = 5s for last item.

broader_pattern: Animations once-on-mount need stable mount detection. Framer Motion AnimatePresence handles.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Animation lifecycle (mount vs every render); cap stagger to prevent slow last-item.

review_summary: TipTap is ~150KB. Included in initial bundle for rare-use feature.

issues_found.title: Editor in initial bundle
issues_found.explanation: Comment form opened maybe 5% of users. 150KB shipped to 100%.

issues_that_arent_issues: TipTap is a fine choice when needed.
broader_pattern: Heavy components for rare features = code split.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Rare features = lazy load; interaction-triggered code split.

review_summary: navigator.share check during render differs server vs client. Hydration mismatch.

issues_found.title: Hydration mismatch
issues_found.explanation: Server: navigator undefined, renders <a>. Client: has navigator.share, renders <button>. Mismatch.

broader_pattern: Client-only state needs useState + useEffect post-mount detection.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Client-only features create hydration mismatches; useState + useEffect pattern.
